ops.title: Track FD: fusekit-holder daemon on daemonkit drain (design-first)
ops.description: The AGENTS.md-referenced durable fork-storm fix: a single signed multi-tenant fusekit-holder daemon consuming daemonkit drain (generations, canonical journal, lease-fence Resources, ScanPeers/AdoptDead), replacing skew-triggered self-retire + LaunchAgent relaunch. Open design questions (from track-f recon 2026-07-18): what fills the frozen retire wire surface (Response.Retiring/ParkedUntil/RetireStrikes/RetireDeferredDir/Reason); successor-spawn vs launchd relaunch under the fork-storm constraint; mount-spec journal vs canonical seq journal relationship. fable design phase gates any implementation.

ops.text: fable design doc resolves: frozen retire wire surface, successor-spawn vs launchd relaunch under the fork-storm constraint, mount-spec vs canonical journal relationship
drain-consumer contract checklist (daemonkit doc 67f6e62) fully satisfied: idempotent double-yield test, exclusive fence blocks successor registrations, every Spawn gated via StrikeStore.SpawnGate
p6 VM drain scenarios green + one observed cask upgrade
